                                                                                
 Usage: wmx [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                         
                                                                                
 Agent-native Windmill CLI.                                                     
                                                                                
 Use the Windmill HTTP API directly, keep output stable for automation, and     
 spill large payloads to the filesystem when needed.                            
 Examples:   wmx --help   wmx whoami   wmx scripts list --json   wmx scripts    
 preview ./scratch.py --data @args.json --wait   wmx resources get u/me/db      
 --reveal --value-only --output-mode file --output-file ./db.json               
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --base-url                     TEXT     Windmill base URL, for example       │
│                                         https://app.windmill.dev             │
│                                         [default: None]                      │
│ --workspace                    TEXT     Windmill workspace id.               │
│                                         [default: None]                      │
│ --token                        TEXT     Windmill user token. [default: None] │
│ --json                                  Emit machine-friendly JSON to        │
│                                         stdout.                              │
│ --quiet                                 Reduce stderr diagnostics.           │
│ --verbose                               Emit extra stderr diagnostics.       │
│ --yes                                   Skip confirmations for destructive   │
│                                         operations.                          │
│ --output-mode                  TEXT     Output policy: inline, auto, or      │
│                                         file.                                │
│                                         [default: auto]                      │
│ --output-file                  PATH     Write the primary payload to this    │
│                                         file.                                │
│                                         [default: None]                      │
│ --spill-dir                    PATH     Directory for automatically spilled  │
│                                         payloads.                            │
│                                         [default: .wmx-output]               │
│ --spill-threshold-bytes        INTEGER  Auto-spill payloads larger than this │
│                                         many bytes.                          │
│                                         [default: 131072]                    │
│ --install-completion                    Install completion for the current   │
│                                         shell.                               │
│ --show-completion                       Show completion for the current      │
│                                         shell, to copy it or customize the   │
│                                         installation.                        │
│ --help                                  Show this message and exit.          │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ whoami                                                                       │
│ doctor                                                                       │
│ scripts     Manage deployed scripts and remote preview runs.                 │
│ flows       Manage Windmill flows and flow previews.                         │
│ resources   Manage Windmill resources.                                       │
│ variables   Manage Windmill variables.                                       │
│ jobs        Inspect and wait on Windmill jobs.                               │
│ queue       Inspect queued and running jobs.                                 │
│ schedules   Manage schedules.                                                │
│ apps        Manage Windmill apps.                                            │
│ docs        Query the Windmill documentation assistant when the instance     │
│             supports it.                                                     │
│ config      Inspect resolved CLI configuration.                              │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
